name: Accounting - Online Interface
description:
Online Accounting API is to be used where the accounting entry is expected to be handed off on-line to the host AND host can provide synchronous response. Typically, this would be for intra-day customer debit and credit transactions. Online API is always for a single batch, containing a single group, which in turn will contain a single accounting entry. An accounting entry will typically have both debit and credit legs. However, if host supports, single-sided entries will also be allowed (wherein an entry has only debit legs or only credit legs).
No debit or credit leg consolidation is supported for this API
Resposne to this API will be synchronous. note: IF host cannot provide synchronous response, then batch interface should be used even for intra-day
